title: Dynamic SQL column construction in update_book
evidence: app.py:170 — f"UPDATE books SET {columns} WHERE id = ?" builds column list via f-string from validate_payload keys (safe in practice since keys are hardcoded to title/author/year/isbn)
suggestion: Use an explicit allowlist check or map columns to a fixed set before interpolation

title: No pagination on GET /books
evidence: app.py:130-140 list_books() returns all rows unconditionally
suggestion: Add ?limit and ?offset query params for large collections
